programme.desc: Drew haggles hard at a museum of vintage farm equipment in Exmouth. Plus, he's bowled over by an amazing collection of arts and crafts furniture - but can he strike a deal? S10/Ep13

programme.title: New: Fixer To Fabulous
programme.desc: Dave and Jenny buy a lakeside cabin to renovate into a cosy retreat, but when a devastating tragedy hits the family, the Marrs must change their plan. S7/Ep2

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Despite setbacks and astounding costs, Ben and Erin push to save a couple's iconic Laurel home, preserving it for another 100 years. S9/Ep5

programme.title: Help! My House Is Haunted
programme.desc: In Bristol, Emma noticed the handprints of a former policeman appearing all over her home. However, he's been dead almost 20 years, so why is he still there? S4/Ep7
